_metadata.title: State Street Bank — Triple Nexus Role

role_1_xrt_lending_agent.entity: State Street Bank and Trust Company
role_1_xrt_lending_agent.function: Securities Lending Agent for SPDR S&P Retail ETF (XRT)
role_1_xrt_lending_agent.significance: State Street lends XRT shares to broker-dealers for short selling and FTD resolution

role_2_occ_custodian.entity: State Street Bank and Trust Company
role_2_occ_custodian.function: Primary custodian for OCC pledged collateral ($60.1B specific deposits)
role_2_occ_custodian.significance: Holds the collateral pledged by clearing members to satisfy OCC margin requirements

role_3_ssnyp_collateral.function: Securities sold, not yet purchased (SSNYP) — $35.17B pledged to OCC

match_to_trs.significance: Tape-reconstructed swap value matches audited balance sheet within 0.08%

nexus_significance: State Street sits at the intersection of three critical functions: lending the shares (XRT), holding the collateral (OCC), and booking the liability (SSNYP). They have full visibility into the $35B loop.
